output.final_deliverable: The capital city of Australia is Canberra. Source: Britannica — https://www.britannica.com/place/Canberra
output.action_summary: A web search returned an authoritative Britannica entry stating "Canberra" is the federal capital of Australia (search result: https://www.britannica.com/place/Canberra). I attempted to visit the highest-priority page to extract a direct excerpt, but the visit action failed and did not return page content, so the answer is supported here by the Britannica search result metadata rather than a visited-page excerpt.

details.text: Target facts: (1) The name of Australia's capital city (expected: 'Canberra'). (2) One authoritative source URL that explicitly states the capital. Likely authoritative sources: - Official Australian Government site (https://www.australia.gov.au) or a government department page (e.g., Department of Infrastructure, Regional Development) - Australian Bureau of Statistics - The Australian Capital Territory government site (canberra.act.gov.au) - Reputable reference sources: Britannica (britannica.com), CIA World Factbook (cia.gov) Verification steps: 1) Search the web to locate authoritative pages that state the capital. 2) Visit the top government or other authoritative page(s) found. 3) Extract the capital city name, capture a supporting excerpt/sentence, and record the visited URL for citation. Measurable outputs: { capital_city: string, source_url: string, excerpt: string }. This plan reduces uncertainty by prioritizing official government sources and cross-checking with a reputable reference.

results.title: Canberra | History, Map, Population, Climate, & Facts | Britannica
results.description: Canberra, federal capital of the Commonwealth of Australia. It occupies part of the Australian Capital Territory, in southern Australia, and is about 150 miles (240 km) southwest of Sydney.

results.title: National Capital Authority
results.description: Canberra, Australia’s National Capital, has a unique purpose, setting, character and symbolism, and it’s important we make sure it continues to do so.

results.title: Canberra, the Seat of Government | National Capital Authority
results.description: As the centre of national politics, ... Farmers Federation and the Returned & Services League. Canberra is not only the national capital but, as the Australian Capital Territory (ACT), it is a self-governing city-state of more than 300 000 citizens....

results.title: Establishing the nation's capital - ACT Legislative Assembly
results.description: The Parliament shall sit at Melbourne until it meets at the seat of Government. Map of some of the proposed sites for the new Australian capital city Source: ACT Legislative Assembly (Re-use policy)

results.title: Seat of Government Act 1908 - Parliamentary Education Office
results.description: Canberra is chosen as Australia’s national capital.
